allow: Bash(powershell.exe -NonInteractive -Command 'Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Speech; $tts = New-Object System.Speech.Synthesis.SpeechSynthesizer; $voices = $tts.GetInstalledVoices\(\) | Where-Object { $_.VoiceInfo.Culture.Name -like '\\''ko*'\\'' }; if \($voices\) { $tts.SelectVoice\($voices[0].VoiceInfo.Name\) }; $tts.Speak\('\\''작업이 끝났습니다'\\''\)')

hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);q=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('query','').upper();found=[w for w in ['DROP TABLE','TRUNCATE TABLE','DELETE FROM monthly_ddd','DELETE FROM brick_master','DELETE FROM uploads'] if w in q];print('⛔ 위험한 SQL 감지: '+', '.join(found)) if found else None;sys.exit(2) if found else None"
echo '📋 마이그레이션 완료 — mcp__supabase__generate_typescript_types 도구로 TypeScript 타입을 재생성하세요'
[ -f tsconfig.json ] && [ -d node_modules ] && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20 || true
